name: CoVe — Chain of Verification
description: Fact-checks LLM responses by extracting claims and verifying them against memory, workspace files, and web search.

required_one_of.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
required_one_of.description: Gemini API key for direct LLM calls (auto-detects provider)

required_one_of.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
required_one_of.description: Anthropic API key for direct LLM calls (auto-detects provider)

required_one_of.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
required_one_of.description: OpenAI API key for direct LLM calls (auto-detects provider)

optional.name: COVE_LLM_PROVIDER
optional.description: Explicit provider override: gemini | anthropic | openai

optional.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
optional.description: Brave Search API key — required for standard/deep policies

optional.name: OPENCLAW_PROXY_PORT
optional.description: Sidecar proxy port (default: 8888) — only needed in sidecar mode

optional.name: SIDECAR_PROXY_KEY
optional.description: Sidecar proxy auth key — only needed in sidecar mode

network_access: 127.0.0.1:{proxy_port} (OpenClaw sidecar — LLM proxy, sidecar mode only)
User-configured vector store URL (optional, if vector_store.url is set)

transparency.note: The agent will tell the user when verification is run and report results. Auto-verify mode must be explicitly enabled in config.
